steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage highlights that residents use the Metro for millions of trips each year.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
“For this reason” shows that the officials' maintenance effort is a direct result of the high ridership noted earlier.
The other three choices either introduce contrast, example, or alternative, which does not fit the cause‑effect relationship.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
